heading: Records
label: 6371i Records
text: Each recipient of assistance under this part shall keep such records, provide such reports, and furnish such access to books and records as the Secretary may by rule prescribe.
notes: Amendments1998— struck out “(a)” before “Each recipient”.Pub. L. 105–388
amendments: Amendments1998— struck out “(a)” before “Each recipient”.Pub. L. 105–388
